title: post orders create new order with validation
description: Test the POST /orders endpoint to create a new order with various order types (DINE_IN, DELIVERY, PICKUP). Verify server-side validation for price calculation, stock availability, and modifier constraints. Ensure guest checkout works without authorization and returns 201 with created order details.

title: get orders my orders list user orders
description: Test the GET /orders/my-orders endpoint with valid authorization token. Verify it returns 200 with a list of orders belonging to the authenticated user, including items, modifiers, and variant product details.

title: get orders product productid download url
description: Test the GET /orders/product/:productId/download endpoint with valid authorization. Verify it returns 200 with a download URL for a digital product owned by the user. Test 403 Forbidden for unauthorized access and 404 Not found for invalid productId.

title: get orders id download productid download url
description: Test the GET /orders/:id/download/:productId endpoint with valid authorization. Verify it returns 200 with a download URL for a specific order item if the user owns the order. Test 403 Forbidden for unauthorized access and 404 Not found for invalid order or product.

title: get admin orders list all orders with filter
description: Test the GET /admin/orders endpoint with valid admin authorization. Verify it returns 200 with a list of all orders including user, items, and modifiers. Test filtering by status query parameter returns filtered orders. Test 401 Unauthorized when no token provided.

title: patch admin orders id status update order status
description: Test the PATCH /admin/orders/:id/status endpoint with valid admin authorization. Verify it updates the order status through the kitchen workflow and returns 200 with updated order details. Test 404 Not found for non-existent order id.

title: post products create new product with validation
description: Test the POST /products endpoint with valid admin authorization. Verify it creates a new product with variants and modifier groups, returning 201 with product details. Test 400 error when using an existing slug. Test 401 Unauthorized when no token provided.

title: post auth login user authentication
description: Test the POST /auth/login endpoint with valid and invalid credentials. Verify successful login returns 200 with accessToken, refreshToken, and user info. Verify invalid credentials return 401 error.

title: post auth register user registration
description: Test the POST /auth/register endpoint to register a new user. Verify it returns 201 with created user details.

title: post auth refresh refresh access token
description: Test the POST /auth/refresh endpoint with a valid refresh token. Verify it returns 200 with a new accessToken.
